name: Baked Beans Ala Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup tomato juice, if made in oven
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the beans.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Boil for 2 minutes and remove from heat.
3. Let soak for 1 hour.
4. Bring to a boil again and simmer approximately 45 minutes or until cooked but not soft or mushy.
5. Drain the beans.
6. Add the remaining ingredients to the crockpot and stir into the beans.
7. Turn on low and cook for 10-12 hours.
OR
Add 1/2 cup tomato juice. Cover tightly and cook in a 200°F oven overnight.
I've also baked this at 325°F for about 3 hours.
